parameters.jsCode:
// Fetch Watchlist — hardcoded AI sector companies to track
const watchlist = [
  { ticker: "NVDA", companyName: "NVIDIA",
    aliases: ["nvidia", "nvda", "jensen huang"] },
  { ticker: "AMD",  companyName: "AMD",
    aliases: ["amd", "advanced micro devices", "lisa su"] },
  { ticker: "INTC", companyName: "Intel",
    aliases: ["intel", "intc", "pat gelsinger"] },
  { ticker: "GOOGL", companyName: "Google",
    aliases: ["google", "alphabet", "googl", "deepmind"] },
  { ticker: "AAPL", companyName: "Apple",
    aliases: ["apple", "aapl", "tim cook"] },
  { ticker: "MSFT", companyName: "Microsoft",
    aliases: ["microsoft", "msft", "azure", "satya nadella"] },
  { ticker: "META", companyName: "Meta",
    aliases: ["meta", "facebook", "zuckerberg", "llama"] }
];

return [{ json: { watchlist } }];

messageValues.message: You are a financial journalist analyst. Your job is to extract the single core claim from each financial news article. Always respond with valid JSON only. No markdown, no explanation, no preamble.

parameters.text:
=For each article, score its information age.

Information age means: how fresh is the underlying claim?
- Score 80-100: Genuinely new — first time this specific claim has been made, new data, new event
- Score 50-79: Partially new — a new development in an ongoing story, adds something to existing narrative
- Score 20-49: Likely recycled — same claim seen before, new framing but old underlying information
- Score 0-19: Recycled — this is commentary, synthesis, or restatement of weeks-old news

Also classify:
  is_recycled: true if score < 40, false otherwise
  narrative_label: a 3-5 word phrase that names the narrative (e.g. "AI chip export restrictions", "Fed rate cut expectations", "NVIDIA data center growth")

Return ONLY a JSON array:
[{
  "article_url": <exact url from input>,
  "information_age_score": <integer 0-100>,
  "is_recycled": <boolean>,
  "narrative_label": <string>
}]

Articles:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.articles.map(a => ({ article_url: a.article_url, headline: a.headline, summary: a.summary, published_at: a.published_at, source: a.source }))) }}

messageValues.message: You are an analyst who detects whether financial news is genuinely new or recycled narrative. Always respond with valid JSON only. No markdown, no explanation.

You are a financial entity recognition system. Your job is to identify which companies from a watchlist are mentioned in each article. Always respond with valid JSON only. No markdown, no explanation.
